About Land Connect

Built on the ground we sell.

Land Connect started with a simple frustration: buying land in Odisha meant chasing paperwork, trusting strangers, and hoping a plot was what it claimed to be. We built a platform — and a team — that does the chasing for you.

Every listing on Land Connect is physically visited, every title cross-checked against government records, and every buyer given a documented trail from enquiry to registry. No verbal promises. No last-minute surprises.

  • Government-record title verification on every plot
  • In-person site visits, recorded and shared with buyers
  • Flat 2% brokerage from each party — disclosed upfront, nothing hidden

Leadership

The people behind the promise.

A small team that insists on doing land verification the slow, careful way — because that's what earns trust.

Founder & CEO "

Debasish Sahoo

Founder & Chief Executive Officer

Debasish founded Land Connect to bring the same rigor he applies to building software — clean architecture, verified data, zero shortcuts — to how Odisha buys and sells land. He leads product, verification standards, and partnerships.

Co-Founder "

Seetikantha Rautaray

Co-Founder & Operations

Seetikantha leads on-ground operations for Land Connect — coordinating site visits, tehsil-level document checks, and buyer handovers across Odisha so every listing holds up to the same standard.

Why Choose Us

Trust isn't a tagline here.
It's the whole process.

01

Verified Titles

Every plot is cross-checked against land records and encumbrance certificates before it's listed.

02

On-Ground Verification

Our team physically visits and photographs each plot — no listing goes live sight-unseen.

03

Transparent Pricing

A flat 2% brokerage from each party, disclosed upfront — nothing hidden, nothing added later.

04

Dedicated Support

One point of contact guides you from shortlisting through registration and handover.

05

Digital Paper Trail

Every document, approval and communication is logged and shareable, not just promised.

06

Local Odisha Expertise

We know the panchayats, the tehsils, and the terrain — knowledge you can't outsource.

Company Values

The four things we won't compromise on.

VAL / 01

Transparency

Every fee, document, and delay is disclosed as it happens — not discovered later.

VAL / 02

Integrity

We turn down listings we can't fully verify, even when it costs us a sale.

VAL / 03

Trust

Relationships outlast transactions. We're here long after the registry is signed.

VAL / 04

Client-First

Every process is designed around what makes the buyer's decision easier, not ours.

Our Process

From first look to final registry.

A fixed sequence, followed for every buyer — so nothing depends on memory or goodwill.

01

Discover

Browse verified plots filtered by district, budget, and land use — every listing pre-checked.

02

Verify

Our team runs a title and encumbrance check against government land records.

03

Visit

A guided, in-person or video site visit, with boundary markers and access roads confirmed.

04

Negotiate

One transparent price discussion, plus a flat 2% brokerage from each party — nothing added afterward.

05

Register

We prepare and accompany you through sale deed drafting and sub-registrar formalities.

06

Handover

Title documents, mutation support, and a dedicated contact for anything after the sale.

FAQ

Questions buyers ask us first.

How do you verify a plot's title?

We cross-check ownership records, encumbrance certificates, and mutation history at the relevant tehsil office before a listing goes live, and share copies of every document with you.

Is Land Connect's process aligned with RERA?

Yes. Our documentation and disclosure process is structured to follow applicable RERA guidelines for the state, and we flag clearly when a listing falls outside RERA's scope.

Can I buy a plot without visiting Odisha in person?

Yes — many of our NRI and out-of-state clients buy remotely. We provide recorded video walkthroughs and can manage registration through power of attorney where applicable.

What does registration and handover actually involve?

We prepare the sale deed, accompany you (or your representative) to the sub-registrar's office, and follow up on mutation of records in your name after registration.

What brokerage fee do you charge?

A flat 2% brokerage is charged to each party — buyer and seller — shared with you in writing before you commit to a plot. It does not change during negotiation or after registration.
